entries.title: SUST DL Enigma
entries.description: Our team QWERTY became champion in this road object detection competition. Images of roads across 9 districts are given as a dataset. Our task was to build a robust model to accurately detect various vehicles and people on the road. We achieved mAP score of .66

entries.title: Inter University CTF, BUET CSE FEST 2023
entries.description: Got selected for the final onsite round by raking in top 30 among 153 teams in preliminary round.
